import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

FLOOR = 1
SQUARE = 4
PYRAMID = 5
YELLOW = 5
GREEN = 2

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Yellow pyramid on grid
    yp_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yp_count = jnp.sum(yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yp_y = jnp.sum(yy * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    yp_x = jnp.sum(xx * yp_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yp_count, 1.0)
    yp_on_grid = (yp_count > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Green square on grid
    gs_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gs_count = jnp.sum(gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    gs_y = jnp.sum(yy * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)
    gs_x = jnp.sum(xx * gs_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gs_count, 1.0)

    # Agent
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # Pocket
    holding_yp = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Normalized
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    norm_ypy = yp_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ypx = yp_x / (W_f - 1)
    norm_gsy = gs_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_gsx = gs_x / (W_f - 1)

    # Relative vectors
    rel_agent_to_yp_y = (yp_y - agent_y) / H_f
    rel_agent_to_yp_x = (yp_x - agent_x) / W_f
    rel_agent_to_gs_y = (gs_y - agent_y) / H_f
    rel_agent_to_gs_x = (gs_x - agent_x) / W_f
    rel_yp_to_gs_y = (gs_y - yp_y) / H_f
    rel_yp_to_gs_x = (gs_x - yp_x) / W_f

    # Distances (normalized)
    dist_agent_yp = (jnp.abs(agent_y - yp_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yp_x)) / (H_f + W_f)
    dist_agent_gs = (jnp.abs(agent_y - gs_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - gs_x)) / (H_f + W_f)
    dist_yp_gs = (jnp.abs(yp_y - gs_y) + jnp.abs(yp_x - gs_x)) / (H_f + W_f)

    # Front tile
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_yp = ((state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == FLOOR).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_gs = ((state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == SQUARE) & (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == GREEN)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Success: yp adjacent to gs (manhattan == 1, on grid)
    manhattan_yp_gs = jnp.abs(yp_y - gs_y) + jnp.abs(yp_x - gs_x)
    adjacent = ((manhattan_yp_gs <= 1.0) & (yp_count > 0) & (gs_count > 0)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Phase indicators
    # Phase 0: not holding, pyramid not adjacent -> go pick up
    # Phase 1: holding pyramid -> go place near green square
    # Phase 2: success

    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 80.0

    obs = jnp.array([
        norm_ay, norm_ax,
        dir_oh[0], dir_oh[1], dir_oh[2], dir_oh[3],
        holding_yp, pocket_empty,
        yp_on_grid,
        norm_ypy, norm_ypx,
        norm_gsy, norm_gsx,
        rel_agent_to_yp_y, rel_agent_to_yp_x,
        rel_agent_to_gs_y, rel_agent_to_gs_x,
        rel_yp_to_gs_y, rel_yp_to_gs_x,
        dist_agent_yp, dist_agent_gs, dist_yp_gs,
        front_tile_id, front_tile_color,
        front_is_yp, front_is_floor, front_is_gs,
        adjacent,
        step_norm,
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)

    return obs


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Helper: get positions
    def get_yp(s):
        mask = (s.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (s.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    def get_gs(s):
        mask = (s.grid[:, :, 0] == SQUARE) & (s.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    yp_y_c, yp_x_c, yp_cnt_c = get_yp(state)
    yp_y_n, yp_x_n, yp_cnt_n = get_yp(next_state)
    gs_y_c, gs_x_c, gs_cnt_c = get_gs(state)
    gs_y_n, gs_x_n, gs_cnt_n = get_gs(next_state)

    ay_c = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_c = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    holding_c = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW))
    holding_n = ((next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW))

    # Success condition: yp on grid, adjacent to gs (manhattan dist == 1)
    man_c = jnp.abs(yp_y_c - gs_y_c) + jnp.abs(yp_x_c - gs_x_c)
    man_n = jnp.abs(yp_y_n - gs_y_n) + jnp.abs(yp_x_n - gs_x_n)

    success_c = (man_c <= 1.0) & (yp_cnt_c > 0) & (gs_cnt_c > 0)
    success_n = (man_n <= 1.0) & (yp_cnt_n > 0) & (gs_cnt_n > 0)

    just_succeeded = (~success_c) & success_n
    reward_success = jax.lax.select(just_succeeded, 10.0, 0.0)

    # Milestone: picked up yellow pyramid
    just_picked = (~holding_c) & holding_n
    reward_pickup = jax.lax.select(just_picked, 2.0, 0.0)

    # Potential-based shaping
    # Phase 1 (not holding, not success): potential = -dist(agent, yp)
    # Phase 2 (holding): potential = -dist(agent, gs)
    # Phase 3 (success): potential = 0

    max_dist = H_f + W_f

    # Phase 1 potential: negative distance from agent to yellow pyramid
    phi1_c = -( jnp.abs(ay_c - yp_y_c) + jnp.abs(ax_c - yp_x_c) ) / max_dist
    phi1_n = -( jnp.abs(ay_n - yp_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - yp_x_n) ) / max_dist

    # Phase 2 potential: negative distance from agent to green square
    phi2_c = -( jnp.abs(ay_c - gs_y_c) + jnp.abs(ax_c - gs_x_c) ) / max_dist
    phi2_n = -( jnp.abs(ay_n - gs_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - gs_x_n) ) / max_dist

    # Also: when holding, we want to be near gs, so use dist(agent, gs)
    # When not holding, use dist(agent, yp)

    # Shaping based on phase
    holding_c_f = holding_c.astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n_f = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    phi_c = jnp.where(holding_c_f > 0, phi2_c, phi1_c)
    phi_n = jnp.where(holding_n_f > 0, phi2_n, phi1_n)

    # Potential-based shaping: gamma=1 (undiscounted)
    shaping = (phi_n - phi_c) * 1.0
    # Disable shaping once success achieved
    shaping = jnp.where(success_n, 0.0, shaping)

    # Additional: when holding, reward decrease in dist(yp_putdown, gs)
    # When pyramid is put down, reward based on how close it is to gs
    just_put_down = holding_c & (~holding_n) & (yp_cnt_n > 0)
    dist_placed = jnp.abs(yp_y_n - gs_y_n) + jnp.abs(yp_x_n - gs_x_n)
    # Reward inversely proportional to distance when placed
    place_reward = jax.lax.select(
        just_put_down,
        jnp.maximum(0.0, (max_dist - dist_placed) / max_dist) * 3.0,
        0.0
    )
    # But don't double-count success
    place_reward = jnp.where(success_n, 0.0, place_reward)

    total = reward_success + reward_pickup + shaping + place_reward

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
